acquisition: ac- + quis(获取) + -ition(名词) => 获取、获客
activation: act(行动/激活) + -iv- + -ation(名词) => 激活
advertiser: advertis(e)(广告投放) + -er(执行者) => 广告主
advertising: advertis(e)(广告投放) + -ing(过程) => 广告投放
analytics: analyt(分析) + -ics(学科/方法) => 分析
archive: arch(记录/档案) + ive => 归档
asset: ass(et) 记作可用资源 => 资产/素材
attribution: at- + tribut(分配/归属) + -ion => 归因
authentication: auth(真实/授权) + entic + -ation => 身份认证
availability: avail(可用) + -ability(能力/性质) => 可用性
bidding: bid(出价) + -ing(过程) => 出价过程
campaign: camp(活动/战役) + -aign => 广告活动
checksum: check(校验) + sum(总和) => 校验和
compatibility: com- + pat(适配) + -ibility(性质) => 兼容性
constraint: con- + strain(拉紧/限制) => 约束
coordination: co- + ordin(顺序/协调) + -ation => 协调
dashboard: dash(快速显示) + board(面板) => 仪表盘
dispatch: dis- + patch(分发) => 分发/派发
enrichment: en- + rich(丰富) + -ment => 数据补全增强
fallback: fall(退回) + back(回退) => 回退方案
impression: im- + press(压印/留下印象) + -ion => 展示
ingestion: in- + gest(带入) + -ion => 数据摄入
inventory: inventor(y) 记作存量清单 => 库存
lineage: line(线索/谱系) + -age => 数据血缘
parameter: para(旁/辅助) + meter(度量) => 参数
pipeline: pipe(管道) + line(线) => 数据管道
reconciliation: re- + concili(调和/一致) + -ation => 对账校准
taxonomy: tax(o)(分类) + -nomy(体系) => 分类体系
throttling: throttle(节流限速) + -ing => 节流限速
troubleshooting: trouble(问题) + shooting(排查) => 故障排查
warehouse: ware(货物/数据) + house(仓库) => 数据仓库
